evals.prompt: Check the skill at skills/actionable/geo-publish for quality problems.
evals.expected_output: Flags the dangling bundled references (reference.md and examples/*.md do not exist) and the missing evals/evals.json; reports frontmatter as valid; does NOT flag any Geo domain content (PK_SW, endpoints, type IDs).

evals.prompt: Check the skill at skills/non-actionable/geo-query for quality problems.
evals.expected_output: Flags reference.md (244 lines) missing a table of contents and the missing evals/evals.json; frontmatter and referenced examples pass; no domain content flagged.

evals.prompt: Check the skill at skills/actionable/geo-clean for quality problems.
evals.expected_output: Flags the dangling reference documentation/big-merge.md, the undefined 'Pattern B/C/D' vocabulary (defined in another skill), and missing evals; does not flag the dated incident (historical justification) or the src/ runtime imports.
